title: System 2 RAG Engine Output Schema
description: Output schema for Russell's RAG fact-verification engine, to be consumed by System 3 (Youssef's Verdict Engine). Includes System 1's classifier signal as a pass-through field for downstream fusion.

claim.description: The original Arabic claim being investigated.

dialect.description: Detected Arabic dialect code (e.g. 'MSA', 'CAI' for Egyptian, 'DOH' for Gulf — not limited to a fixed enum; the underlying classifier (CAMeL-Lab dialect model) supports multiple dialect codes).

query_used.description: The (possibly normalized) query actually sent to retrieval.

verdict_signal.description: Categorical retrieval-confidence signal driving the final_verdict.

final_verdict.description: This system's own verdict. System 3 may agree, override, or fuse this with classifier_signal.

bucket_a.description: Matches from the verified-claims database (AraFacts + Saheeh Masr).

debunk.description: Truncated to 200 chars. Often an EMPTY STRING for saheeh_masr-sourced entries — that dataset doesn't include description/debunk text the way AraFacts does. Do not treat an empty debunk as evidence of anything; check 'source' before relying on this field.

bucket_b.description: Evidence propositions from the live news knowledge base (28,800+ propositions, 7 RSS sources, auto-updated every 4h).

proposition_display.description: Decontextualized version. Only present on the top-ranked hit; falls back to 'proposition' if decontextualization was unavailable.

hybrid_score.description: RRF fusion score (BM25 rank + E5 rank). Typical range ~0.005-0.04 — NOT a [0,1] confidence, do not use as a normalized weight.

bm25_rank.description: 1-based BM25 rank (lower = better match). NOT a score.

e5_rank.description: 1-based E5-large embedding rank (lower = better match). NOT a score.

rerank_score.description: Cross-encoder relevance score. Typical range ~-8 to +10. F1-calibrated threshold for 'real evidence' is > 2.0 (see Reranker_Calibration_Report.md). This is the recommended field for weighting evidence strength, not hybrid_score.

bucket_b_searched.description: False only when a HIGH-tier Bucket A match short-circuited the pipeline.

classifier_signal.description: System 1's (Sarah's) raw classifier output, passed through unmodified. Fusion with this system's own final_verdict is intentionally NOT performed here — it happens downstream in System 3, per both systems' design.

vs_v1_schema: bm25_score/arabert_score (floats, [0,1]) replaced by bm25_rank/e5_rank (integer ranks) — retrieval upgraded from AraBERT weighted-sum to E5-large + RRF fusion.
Added rerank_score — cross-encoder score, F1-calibrated, the recommended field for evidence-weighting (NOT hybrid_score, which is now a tiny RRF value, not a [0,1] score).
Added final_verdict and confidence at top level (this system's own verdict, separate from System 3's fused verdict).
Added classifier_signal — System 1's raw output, passed through unmodified for downstream fusion.
Added proposition_display — decontextualized top evidence text.

Query reformulation/retry was removed after testing showed it never had a fair case to help on (Bucket B coverage gaps cannot be fixed by rewording a query) — reformulated_query/retry_triggered fields no longer exist.
